prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-GRNGOLDPANKIT-5PC Product Type: OUTDOOR_LIVING Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Gold Rush Gold Prospecting Pan Kit Melting Pot Testing Stone - 5pc Description: Strike it rich with the ASR Outdoor 5pc Gold Rush Kit.

This set comes with some basic gold prospecting items that you'll need to sift, locate, contain and test your minerals. In the kit we've included a 10" diameter green gold pan - the deep green color will help you identify gold and other specimens from dirt, sand and sediment.

Inside the gold pan, you'll find a dropper pipette with a capacity of 3mL - the perfect size for absorbing gold, liquid or other particles that you're working with. Additionally we've included a metal testing stone that you can use to determine the metal you've located as well as a ceramic melting pot to smelt down your findings.

Lastly we've added in a 2 dram gold collection vial to store your small findings and keep them contained. This is a great gold prospecting set for beginners as well as fanatics. Search Terms: prospecting gold panning digger hiking backpacking Features: - 5pc Gold Rush Kit - Green 10" Pan - 2 Dram Glass Vial for Collecting Minerals - 2" Testing Stone for Testing Metal - 3mL Capacity Dropper Pipette - Ceramic Melting Pot for Smelting Precious Metals === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 5-pc Gold Rush Gold Panning Kit Green 10in
